title: Finnish Images of the Soviet Union, Russians and Estonians 1989
description: The data consist of 40 theme interviews of Finns on the subject of the Soviet Union, Russians and Estonians. During the interviews, the interviewees were shown pictures, word lists and extracts from various texts and newspapers related to the Soviet Union, and asked to comment on them. Themes raised in the interviews covered politics, everyday life, economy and culture. Views were probed on the Soviet Union as a state and on Russian and Estonian people.
